subcodes.first_line: O thou who believest in God! Bear thou witness within thine own self that there is none other God but Him, and that 'Alí-Qabli-Nabíl is His Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ایها المومن بالله ان اشهد فی نفسک بانه لا اله الا هو و ان علیا قبل نبیل مظهر
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude, @firmness in the Covenant
